title: Lucid Announces Third Quarter 2024 Financial Results
text: Lucid delivered 2,781 vehicles in Q3 2024, representing a 90.9% increase compared to the same period last year. The company generated $200 million in revenue and produced 1,805 vehicles during the quarter. The automaker reported a GAAP net loss per share of $0.41 and a non-GAAP net loss per share of $0.28. At quarter-end, Lucid maintained approximately $5.16 billion in total liquidity. Management expected to manufacture roughly 9,000 vehicles throughout 2024. Following the quarter, the company completed a capital raise of approximately $1.75 billion in October. CEO Peter Rawlinson highlighted the company's momentum with its third consecutive quarter of record deliveries. He noted that the Lucid Gravity SUV order book opened on track for start of production in 2024. CFO Gagan Dhingra remarked on profitability improvements, noting the company continued to see improvements to gross margin performance as cost reduction efforts gained momentum. The company advanced its two-model strategy with the Gravity SUV launch while continuing production of the flagship Air sedan, starting at $69,900.
